code: import React,{useCallback,useEffect,useRef,useState}from'react';import{socket,ensureSocketConnection,joinRoom}from'../services/socket';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Chatbot(_ref){let{userId}=_ref;const[messages,setMessages]=useState([]);const[text,setText]=useState('');const room=userId||'anon-room';const scrollRef=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{ensureSocketConnection(userId);joinRoom(room);const handler=_ref2=>{let{reply}=_ref2;setMessages(prev=>[...prev,{author:'bot',text:reply}]);};socket.on('chat_reply',handler);return()=>{socket.off('chat_reply',handler);};},[room]);const send=useCallback(()=>{if(!text.trim())return;setMessages(prev=>[...prev,{author:'user',text}]);socket.emit('chat_message',{userId,text,room});setText('');},[text,userId,room]);useEffect(()=>{if(scrollRef.current){scrollRef.current.scrollTop=scrollRef.current.scrollHeight;}},[messages]);const handleKeyDown=evt=>{if(evt.key==='Enter'&&!evt.shiftKey){evt.preventDefault();send();}if(evt.key==='Escape'){evt.preventDefault();setText('');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chatbot-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chatbot-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Chatbot IA"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Enter para enviar. Escape limpia el borrador."})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chatbot-body",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{ref:scrollRef,className:"chatbot-messages",children:messages.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chatbot-empty",children:["Inicia la conversacion para recibir ayuda inmediata.",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Ejemplo: \"Necesito crear un ticket de soporte.\""})]}):messages.map((msg,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"chatbot-bubble ".concat(msg.author==='bot'?'bot':'user'),children:msg.text},"".concat(msg.author,"-").concat(index)))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chatbot-input",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{value:text,onChange:e=>setText(e.target.value),onKeyDown:handleKeyDown,placeholder:"Escribe tu pregunta..."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:send,children:"Enviar"})]})]})]});}
